case_title: JOHN HORIA VS. SAN FRANCISCAN RESTAURANT et al

docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF DEC-02-2008 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF DEC-02-2008 BY PAUL SLAVIT. PLAINTIFF PRESENT. DEFENDANT SAN FRANCISCAN RESTAURANT PRESENT. DEFENDANT STINK, INC NOT PRESENT. NO PROOF OF SERVICE. EXHIBITS RETAINED. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506).
NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT, RETURNED, SENT TO STINK, INC.
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (FEE FOR SERVICE:$50.00) SERVED OCT-29-2008, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT SAN FRANCISCAN RESTAURANT

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF HORIA, JOHN RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT SAN FRANCISCAN RESTAURANT $2,475.50 PRINCIPAL, $130.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,605.50, PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM IS AMENDED TO CORRECTLY NAME DEFENDANT AS SF 39, INC. DEFENDANT WAIVES SERVICE OF CLAIM AND NOTICE OF TRIAL. DEFENDANT STINK, INC. DISMISSED WITHOUT PREJUDICE. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S AND DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
CASE DISMISSED WITHOUT PREJUDICE AS TO STINK INC. DBA THE STINKING ROSE INC. BY COURT AT SMALL CLAIM HEARING OF DEC-02-2008 AT 1:30PM.
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF DEC-02-2008 - JUDGMENT.
